indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space allows for a wide range of movement and positioning during yoga and stretching.

indicators.name: Natural light from windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light can enhance the mood and focus during yoga practice.

indicators.name: Minimal furniture
indicators.rationale: Minimal furniture reduces distractions and allows for more space to move freely.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for yoga and stretching due to its large open area, natural lighting, and minimal furniture.
